regions.content:
技术要求:
定子引出线按GB/T7345-2008要求:
对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9N的拉力,
试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
regions.content_en: Technical requirements: Stator lead wires shall comply with GB/T7345-2008 requirements: For stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall withstand a pull force of 9N. After the test, the lead wire shall not break, and the insulation and core shall not be damaged.

labels.label_text_original: 对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9N的拉力,
labels.translation_en_simple: Each lead wire of stator three-phase must withstand 9N pull
labels.translation_en_full: For the stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall withstand a pulling force of 9 N,

labels.label_text_original: 试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
labels.translation_en_simple: After test, no breakage, no damage to insulation or core
labels.translation_en_full: After the test, the lead wire shall not break, and the insulation and conductor shall not be damaged.

records.label_text_original: 对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9N的拉力,
records.translation_en_simple: Each lead wire of stator three-phase must withstand 9N pull
records.translation_en_full: For the stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall withstand a pulling force of 9 N,

records.label_text_original: 试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
records.translation_en_simple: After test, no breakage, no damage to insulation or core
records.translation_en_full: After the test, the lead wire shall not break, and the insulation and conductor shall not be damaged.

ocr.text:
技术要求:
定子引出线按GB/T7345-2008要求:
对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9N的拉力,
试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。

items.text: 对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9N的拉力,
试验后，引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
